title: review-entry
description: Frontmatter contract for a VSDD review-log entry (review-log/*.md). This is mdatron's own typed-markdown corpus; verifying it clean is the self-validation gate (#46).

review_number.description: Monotonic review index within the project.

date.description: ISO 8601 calendar date the review ran.

phase.description: VSDD phase the review belongs to (phase-0 .. phase-4, with letter suffixes).

lens.description: Domain lens / stance the reviewer adopted.

execution_method.description: How the review session was run (cold-session task tool, inline, etc.).

session_note.description: Reviewer's framing note for the session.

sycophancy_compensation.description: Declared counter-sycophancy stance for the review.

supplements_loaded.description: Optional: language/tooling supplements loaded for the review.

filename_note.description: Optional: note reconciling the entry's filename with its content.
